<!--
Reusable links block for team pages.
-->

<div class="profile-links">
  <a href="#" aria-label="Team website">{{< fa globe >}} Team page</a>
  <span class="sep">·</span>
  <a href="https://github.com/orgs/UKDRI/teams/ad-genomics-cardiff" aria-label="GitHub">{{< fa brands github >}} GitHub</a>
  <span class="sep">·</span>
  <a href="mailto:team-contact@example.org" aria-label="Email">{{< fa envelope >}} Contact</a>
  <span class="sep">·</span>
  <a href="#" aria-label="UK DRI Cardiff">{{< fa building-columns >}} UK DRI Cardiff</a>
</div>
